description_long: This is a young adult male pedestrian dressed in casual urban attire. He wears a hooded sweatshirt layered under a sleeveless utility vest with multiple pockets, paired with cargo pants that have side pockets. His footwear consists of classic lace-up sneakers, and his hands are relaxed at his sides. The figure has medium-length, slightly wavy hair that covers his ears and forehead. The overall appearance suggests a comfortable, practical style suitable for city streets or parks.
description: A casually dressed young adult male with a hooded sweatshirt, utility vest, cargo pants, and sneakers, standing upright with relaxed arms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hooded sweatshirt, utility vest with pockets, cargo pants, and sneakers, with facial features and hair visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hood, vest, and the relaxed arm posture, with the side pockets of the cargo pants visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hooded sweatshirt, vest, and cargo pants, with both arms slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the clothing layers and the relaxed stance.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded sweatshirt layered with a sleeveless utility vest and cargo pants
